About Fydell

Building a fairer way to hire.

Fydell exists to replace resume theater with real evidence, so companies can make stronger decisions and candidates can show what they can truly do.

Our missionSee Fydell in action

Our mission

To make hiring fairer and smarter by measuring what people can actually do, giving every candidate a real chance to be seen.

Better decisions

Give hiring teams real evidence instead of guesswork.

More opportunity

Open doors for talent that resumes overlook.

Stronger outcomes

Build teams that perform from day one.

Our values

The principles behind every simulation we build and every decision we help teams make.

Evidence over intuition

We trust what candidates do, not what they claim.

Fairness by design

Every candidate gets the same structured chance to show their skills.

Built for impact

We measure success by the outcomes our customers achieve.

What we believe

Convictions that guide how we think about talent, fairness, and the future of work.

People are more than their resumes

Real ability shows up in real work, not a list of past titles.

Fairness drives performance

Objective, consistent evaluation surfaces the strongest talent.

Technology should elevate humanity

We build tools that help people show, and grow, their potential.

Our journey

From an idea to a movement.

1

The beginning

Fydell was founded on a simple idea: hiring should be based on what people can do.

2

Building the science

We built the simulation engine and validation framework that power our platform.

3

Early impact

Companies started seeing measurable improvements in quality, diversity, and time to hire.

4

Expanding outcomes

We launched new solutions across more roles, teams, and industries.

5

What's next

We're continuing to innovate, advancing fairer, smarter, and more human hiring.

We're building the future of hiring.

Join a mission-driven team that's reimagining how the world discovers and grows talent.

Explore careers
fydell
